title: Tree spirit (Lost City)
wikitext:
{{External|rs=Dramen tree spirit|rsc=Tree spirit}} {{Otheruses|the quest boss fought during [[Lost City]]|the [[Nightmare Zone]] variant|Tree spirit (Nightmare Zone)}} {{Infobox Monster |name = Tree spirit |image = [[File:Tree spirit (Lost City).png|150px]] |release = [[27 February]] [[2002]] |update = Latest RuneScape News (27 February 2002) |members = Yes |combat = 101 |size = 1 |examine = Guardian of the dramen tree. |attributes = undead, spectral |xpbonus = 0 |max hit = 10 |aggressive = Yes |poisonous = No |attack style = [[Crush]] |attack speed = 4 |slayxp = 85 |cat = Ghosts |assignedby1 = turael,spria,mazchna |hitpoints = 85 |att = 90 |str = 95 |def = 80 |mage = 1 |range = 1 |attbns = 0 |strbns = 0 |amagic = 0 |mbns = 0 |arange = 0 |rngbns = 0 |dstab = 0 |dslash = 0 |dcrush = 0 |dmagic = 0 |drange = 0 |immunepoison = No |immunevenom = No |id = 1163 |elementalweaknesstype=fire |elementalweaknesspercent=35 }} The '''Dramen Tree Spirit''' only appears in [[Entrana Dungeon]] when doing the [[Lost City]] quest. Players have to fight it with limited armour and weapons, as it only appears on [[Entrana]]. During the quest, it is also considered a [[ghost]] for the purposes of a [[Slayer task]]. It can be fought in the [[Nightmare Zone]] after the quest is complete, but will not count towards a ghost task. The Dramen Tree Spirit drops nothing, but allows the player to cut dramen branches from the [[Dramen tree]] when defeated, which players can use to finish the [[Lost City]], or make cinnamon for the [[Recipe for Disaster#Sir Amik Varze|Sir Amik Varze subquest in Recipe for Disaster]]. ==Strategy== [[File:Tree spirit (Lost City) safespot.png|thumb|A safespot that can be used against the Dramen Tree Spirit.]] It can be ranged or maged safely in a safespot using materials allowed on Entrana. It is not advised to use the [[bronze axe]] dropped from the [[zombies]] to kill it as the axe is weak and the tree spirit has high defence. It's easy to range the tree spirit, or use magic, with it being weak to fire spells and [[Crumble Undead]]. [[Arrows]], unstrung [[bow]]s, and [[bow string]]s are allowed on the island. Simply string the bow when you reach the dungeon. For those who prefer not to use ranged or magic attacks, the [[ring of recoil]] is an option. However if you take too long, after about 10 minutes, the spirit will despawn and you will have to refight it. The spirit will respawn after attempting to chop the tree again. ==Prayer info== {{Prayer info |name = Tree spirit |level = 40 |xp = 17 |type = spectral }} ==Dialogue== {{Hastranscript|npc}} ==Changes== {{Subject changes header}} {{Subject_changes |date = 25 June 2025 |update = Summer Sweep Up: Combat |change = The Tree Spirit now has a 35% [[elemental weakness]] to [[fire spells]]. }} {{Subject_changes |date = 20 January 2021 |update = Puro-Puro Improvements and Barbarian Assault Changes |change = The Tree Spirit was made into a [[Spectral (attribute)|spectral]] creature. }} {{Subject changes |date = 22 January 2007 |update = The Lair of Tarn Razorlor |change = The NPC was graphically updated. }} {{Subject changes footer}} ===Gallery (historical)=== {|style="text-align: center" cellpadding="15" |[[File:Tree spirit (Lost City) (historical).png|center|300x150px]] |[[File:Tree spirit (Lost City).png|center|300x150px]] |- |29 March 2004 –
